register.issue: First name input missing 'for' attribute on label element
register.impact: Screen reader users cannot associate the label with the input field, making it unclear what data is expected

register.issue: Email address input has no label element at all
register.impact: Screen reader users have no way to know what the field is for; field purpose is completely hidden
Screen readers cannot properly associate label with input, causing confusion about field purpose

register.issue: Company name field marked with aria-hidden='true' but remains focusable
register.impact: Screen reader users cannot know about a field they can still tab to and interact with, creating cognitive dissonance

register.issue: Phone number field uses div with class='looks-like-label' instead of <label> element
register.impact: Screen readers do not recognize this as a label; field has no programmatic association

register.issue: Birth date field has no label element
register.impact: Screen reader users cannot identify field purpose; additionally uses wrong input type

register.issue: Country select has tabindex='-1' removing it from keyboard navigation entirely
register.impact: Keyboard-only users cannot access this required field at all using Tab key

register.issue: Role radio buttons not grouped in fieldset/legend elements
register.impact: Screen reader users cannot perceive the relationship between related radio buttons and their grouping label

register.issue: Chaotic tabindex values (4, 1, 6, 2, 3, 5, 7, 99, -1) create unpredictable tab order
register.impact: Keyboard users experience illogical navigation flow, tabindex='99' jumps focus unexpectedly

register.issue: Hero note text color #cce9f7 on background #0070AD has insufficient contrast ratio
register.impact: Users with low vision or color blindness cannot read the quick setup notice

register.issue: Birth date input type='text' instead of type='date'
register.impact: Users cannot benefit from native date picker; manual entry is required for everyone

register.issue: Delivery speed radio buttons have inconsistent tabindex values (-1 and 9)
register.impact: Keyboard navigation is broken; one radio button is skipped entirely

register.issue: Link text 'Click here' in consent checkbox is non-descriptive
register.impact: Screen reader users reviewing link list cannot understand link purpose; vague for all users

register.issue: Simulated custom checkbox is not keyboard focusable and has no ARIA role
register.impact: Keyboard users cannot interact with control; screen readers do not recognize it as a checkbox

register.issue: Terms modal has no focus trap and modal close button has focus management issues
register.impact: Keyboard users can tab out of modal; focus management is unpredictable

register.issue: Quick Tips modal lacks keyboard escape handler and focus management
register.impact: Keyboard users cannot close modal using Escape key; focus may be lost

complaint.issue: HTML lang attribute set to 'en' but entire page content is in Polish
complaint.impact: Screen readers will pronounce Polish text with English accent, severely impacting comprehension

complaint.issue: Viewport meta includes user-scalable=no and maximum-scale=1.0
complaint.impact: Users with low vision cannot zoom in to read text; violates ability to resize text

complaint.issue: Page title is generic 'Strona' (Page) without descriptive content
complaint.impact: Screen reader users cannot identify page purpose from browser title

complaint.issue: No semantic landmarks: missing <main>, <form>, <nav>, <section> elements
complaint.impact: Screen reader users cannot efficiently navigate page structure using landmark regions

complaint.issue: Large text styled as h1 using div with inline styles instead of semantic <h1> element
complaint.impact: Screen readers do not recognize text as heading; page outline is broken

complaint.issue: Heading hierarchy broken: jumps directly to <h5> without h1-h4 sequence
complaint.impact: Screen reader users cannot follow logical document outline; navigation is confusing

complaint.issue: Employee ID field has no associated label element; span serves as visual label only
complaint.impact: Screen readers do not announce field purpose; semantically unrelated to input

complaint.issue: Employee ID input marked aria-hidden='true' while remaining keyboard focusable
complaint.impact: Screen reader users are unaware of a field they can still tab to and fill

complaint.issue: Problem description textarea has only placeholder attribute as label
complaint.impact: Label disappears when user starts typing; screen reader has no persistent label

complaint.issue: Problem description textarea has text color #e0e0e0 on white background - 1.1:1 contrast ratio
complaint.impact: Text is nearly invisible; low vision users and users in bright environments cannot read content

complaint.issue: Multiple text elements use low-contrast class with #d3d3d3 or similar on white
complaint.impact: Users with low vision struggle to read instructions and field labels

complaint.issue: Priority radio buttons not grouped in fieldset/legend elements
complaint.impact: Screen reader users cannot perceive relationship between radios and grouping label

complaint.issue: Duplicate id attribute 'bad-radio' on two different elements
complaint.impact: Invalid HTML; some assistive technologies may fail to parse correctly

complaint.issue: Submit button implemented as div with onclick, no role='button', no keyboard support
complaint.impact: Keyboard-only users cannot submit form; screen readers do not recognize as button

complaint.issue: Link text 'Tutaj' (Here) is non-descriptive and lacks context
complaint.impact: Screen reader users reviewing link list cannot understand navigation purpose

complaint.issue: Input id='trap' uses onkeydown preventDefault to trap Tab key, blocking keyboard escape
complaint.impact: Keyboard users are completely trapped and cannot navigate away from the field

complaint.issue: Emergency escape button has tabindex='-1' and aria-hidden='true' but is visible and clickable
complaint.impact: Keyboard users cannot access emergency escape; contradictory hidden/visible states

complaint.issue: Logo image has alt text 'plik_logo2.png' - a filename, not a meaningful description
complaint.impact: Screen reader users hear filename instead of understanding it's the Capgemini logo

complaint.issue: Missing label element entirely for the employee ID field
complaint.impact: Screen readers have no way to announce field purpose or context

complaint.issue: Chaotic tabindex sequence (3, 1, 4, 2, 5, -1) creates unpredictable focus order
complaint.impact: Keyboard users experience illogical navigation; negative tabindex removes element from flow

order.issue: HTML lang attribute set to 'en' but some Polish content present (Zgłoś awarię)
order.impact: Screen readers may pronounce mixed-language content inconsistently

order.issue: Logo image has alt text 'picture' - a generic term, not descriptive
order.impact: Screen reader users do not know this is the Capgemini corporate logo

order.issue: Custom dropdown with tabindex='-1' is not keyboard accessible
order.impact: Keyboard-only users cannot select computer type; Tab key skips this required field

order.issue: Computer Type field uses fake-label div instead of <label> element
order.impact: Screen readers do not recognize label; no semantic association with control

order.issue: Shipping Address input has no label element, only placeholder
order.impact: Screen readers cannot announce field purpose; label disappears when user starts typing

order.issue: Business Justification textarea has color #cbe1f1 on background #f0f6fa - very low contrast
order.impact: Text is difficult to read; users with low vision cannot access content

order.issue: Detailed explanation textarea has no label and tabindex='-1'
order.impact: Keyboard users cannot access field; screen readers do not announce purpose

order.issue: Detailed explanation uses fake-label div instead of proper <label>
order.impact: Screen readers do not connect label to textarea semantically

order.issue: Current Device Serial Number uses green border color alone to indicate valid state
order.impact: Users with color blindness or low vision cannot perceive validation status

order.issue: Cost Center field uses fake-label div instead of <label>
order.impact: Screen readers do not recognize label; no semantic association

order.issue: Disabled Cost Center field has light gray text on light gray background - very low contrast
order.impact: Even disabled state text is nearly invisible to users with low vision

order.issue: Checkboxes not properly labeled - using span with onclick instead of <label> elements
order.impact: Screen readers do not announce checkbox labels; click target is too small

order.issue: Manager Approval checkbox label uses red color only to indicate requirement status
order.impact: Users with color blindness cannot perceive that this field is required

order.issue: Urgency radio buttons not grouped in fieldset/legend elements
order.impact: Screen reader users cannot perceive relationship between related options

order.issue: Urgency radio buttons use span with onclick instead of proper <label> elements
order.impact: Screen readers do not properly announce labels; click targets are too small

order.issue: ASAP radio button has tabindex='-1' removing it from keyboard navigation
order.impact: Keyboard users cannot select the ASAP urgency option using Tab key

order.issue: Accessories selector uses div items with onclick, no keyboard support or ARIA
order.impact: Keyboard-only users cannot select accessories; screen readers do not recognize as interactive

order.issue: Form submit implemented as div.submit-div with onclick, not a button
order.impact: Keyboard users cannot submit form; screen readers do not recognize as button

order.issue: Quick Tips modal lacks keyboard escape handler and focus trap
order.impact: Keyboard users cannot close modal using Escape; focus management is broken

order.issue: Textarea for detailed explanation has only placeholder text, no persistent label
order.impact: Users cannot remember field purpose after starting to type; screen readers have no label

summary.issue: Logo image alt text 'logo' is generic; should specify it's Capgemini branding
summary.impact: Screen reader users do not get clear identification of corporate logo

summary.issue: Navigation links have color #95b8d1 on white background - insufficient contrast
summary.impact: Users with low vision or color blindness struggle to read navigation

summary.issue: Order details section uses div with class='looks-like-heading' instead of semantic heading
summary.impact: Screen reader users cannot identify section hierarchy; page structure is obscured

summary.issue: Next steps section uses non-semantic div with class='looks-like-heading'
summary.impact: Screen readers do not recognize section break; content appears as unstructured text

summary.issue: Delivery tracking section uses divs to fake table structure instead of <table> element
summary.impact: Screen reader users cannot navigate or understand table structure; no cell associations

summary.issue: Fake table has no header row semantics; column meanings are unclear
summary.impact: Screen reader users cannot understand what each column represents

summary.issue: Status column uses color alone (green for Dispatched, orange for Processing) for meaning
summary.impact: Users with color blindness cannot understand delivery status

summary.issue: Show diagnostic data toggle uses only onclick with no keyboard support or aria-expanded
summary.impact: Keyboard-only users cannot expand/collapse section; no announcement of state change

summary.issue: Diagnostic data toggle marked aria-hidden='true' despite being user-interactive
summary.impact: Screen reader users cannot access this interactive control

summary.issue: Leave feedback section inputs have no label elements, only placeholders
summary.impact: Screen readers do not announce field purpose; labels disappear when typing

summary.issue: Feedback form inputs have color #d6d2e0 on white background - low contrast
summary.impact: Text is difficult to read; users with low vision cannot access form

summary.issue: Submit Feedback is a styled div, not a button; no keyboard support
summary.impact: Keyboard-only users cannot submit feedback; screen readers do not recognize as button

summary.issue: Focusable hidden helper div with tabindex='0' serves no purpose and traps focus
summary.impact: Keyboard users can tab to an invisible element that does nothing

summary.issue: Quick Tips modal lacks keyboard escape handler and focus trap management
summary.impact: Keyboard users cannot close modal; focus may escape modal context

summary.issue: Delivery tracking heading uses non-semantic div instead of <h2> or <h3>
summary.impact: Screen reader page structure is broken; users cannot navigate by headings

global.issue: No skip navigation link present on any page
global.impact: Keyboard users must tab through all navigation links before reaching main content

global.issue: No <main> landmark on any page; primary content not marked with semantic element
global.impact: Screen reader users cannot quickly jump to main content using landmark navigation

global.issue: Consistent pattern of using div/span with onclick instead of native button elements
global.impact: Keyboard and screen reader accessibility is compromised across entire application

global.issue: Quick Tips modals appear on all pages without focus trap or proper keyboard handling
global.impact: Keyboard users can tab outside modal context; Escape key does not close modal

global.issue: No form validation error messages or aria-invalid announcements
global.impact: Users do not receive feedback when form validation fails; errors are silent

global.issue: Language attribute inconsistency: some pages 'en', some 'pl', some not specified properly
global.impact: Screen readers may pronounce content in wrong language, hindering comprehension

global.issue: Widespread use of fake labels (styled divs/spans) instead of <label> elements
global.impact: Form accessibility is fundamentally broken; screen readers do not announce labels

global.issue: Inconsistent and illogical tabindex usage across pages with negative and high values
global.impact: Tab order is unpredictable; keyboard navigation is confusing and error-prone

global.issue: Divs used to simulate headings, buttons, tables, and other semantic elements
global.impact: Screen reader users lose access to semantic structure and navigational shortcuts

global.issue: No visible focus indicator; focus styles appear to be removed or default browser styles hidden
global.impact: Keyboard users cannot see where focus is on the page; navigation is blind
